Headline: #20 Madison Temporary Reroute near Madison/Hoyne
ShortDescription: 20 Madison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Madison/Hoyne.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#20 Madison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Madison/Hoyne.

Eastbound buses will operate via Madison, Western, Warren, Damen, then resume their normal route on Madison.

Westbound buses will operate via Madison, Damen, Washington, Western, then resume their normal route on Madison.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #75 74th-75th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 75th/Lafayette
ShortDescription: Eastbound 75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Vincennes, 76th and Lafayette: due to, street blockage near 75th/Lafayette.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #75 74th-75th buses are temporarily rerouted via 75th, Vincennes, 76th and Lafayette: due to, street blockage near 75th/Lafayette.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
